extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each category: all “By” rows were excluded. Against the company shows nil across categories; against directors has six tax proceedings but directors’ personal tax matters are excluded; against promoters has one disciplinary SEBI/stock-exchange matter, which is not counted as statutory/regulatory; against subsidiaries has eight tax proceedings and two statutory/regulatory proceedings, while the two disciplinary proceedings are excluded because they duplicate the regulatory matters; no criminal proceedings are shown against the relevant entities. The quantified amount against subsidiaries is ₹5.96 lakhs, with no quantified amount against the company, converting to ₹0.0596 crore; promoter/director and group-company amounts were excluded. Contingent liabilities are disclosed as ₹11,887.00 lakhs and ₹235.06 lakhs as of August 31, 2022; because no total row is shown, these were summed to ₹12,122.06 lakhs, or ₹121.2206 crore. The only customer-concentration percentages are segment-specific (finance, agency, and physical-commodities activities), not company-wide top-five/top-ten revenue percentages; the source tables use ₹ lakhs, converted to crore by dividing by 100.
